# solidfire_qos_policy (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "solidfire_qos_policy" "high_priority" {
  name       = "HighPriority"
  min_iops   = 1000
  max_iops   = 5000
  burst_iops = 10000
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `qos` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--qos))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `qos_policy_id` (Number)
- `volume_ids` (List of Number)

<a id="nestedblock--qos"></a>
### Nested Schema for `qos`

Required:

- `burst_iops` (Number)
- `max_iops` (Number)
- `min_iops` (Number)
